francophone.excerpt: Le président républicain avait accolé en décembre son nom à celui de son lointain prédécesseur démocrate assassiné John F. Kennedy pour la rebaptiser "Trump Kennedy Center".

anglophone.title: Trump booed in New York as he becomes first US president to attend NBA Finals
anglophone.excerpt: The catcalls came after ticketholders faced airport-style security to enter the venue at Madison Square Garden.

anglophone.title: Morning news brief
anglophone.excerpt: Israel and Iran agree to stop strikes for now, voters in four states head to the polls Tuesday for primaries, Trump makes baseless claims about election fraud in California.

anglophone.title: Black bear caught in Japan after days of sightings

anglophone.title: Sweden set to ban mobile phones in schools

anglophone.excerpt: A federal judge on Monday struck down the Trump administration's $100,000 fee on new H-1B visas. The administration announced the fee as a way of preventing foreign workers from taking American jobs.
